name: Memegen
short_desc: Self-hosted meme generator with a URL API, 780+ built-in templates (incl. animated), and arbitrary custom backgrounds.
author: Jace Browning
description: Memegen is a stateless meme generator: every meme is described entirely by its URL, so there is no database, no Redis, and nothing to log in to. This build bakes in all 200+ upstream templates (Drake, Distracted Boyfriend, Two Buttons, Gru's Plan, and many more) plus 574 curated extra trending formats (VLM-marked caption geometry), including animated MP4 templates that render to GIF, WebP, or MP4. Beyond the built-in templates it supports fully dynamic custom backgrounds: point the `custom` endpoint at any image URL and it captions that image on the fly, e.g. `/images/custom/top_line/bottom_line.png?background=https://example.com/any-image.png`. Rendered memes are cached to a local volume. The image is built from source (linux/amd64) with a small patch adding MP4 animated-source support, since upstream publishes no public image.
